diagrams.title: 2D Transformation Matrix Layout
diagrams.description: Shows the structure of a 3×3 homogeneous transformation matrix with labeled sections
diagrams.purpose: Understand matrix organization and identify transformation types

diagrams.title: Rotation about Arbitrary Point
diagrams.description: Visual demonstration of rotating a triangle about point P(h,k) using three-step transformation
diagrams.purpose: Understand sequence of transformations for rotation about arbitrary point

diagrams.title: Order Dependence Demonstration
diagrams.description: Shows how rotating then translating gives different result from translating then rotating the same object
diagrams.purpose: Visual proof that transformation order matters

diagrams.title: Local vs Global Transformation
diagrams.description: Shows how pre-multiplication (global) vs post-multiplication (local) affects transformation
elements: Pre-multiply: rotate entire world around object
diagrams.purpose: Understand coordinate system effects on transformations

visuals.title: Concatenation Of Transformations
visuals.description: Visual diagram for concatenation of transformations
